## 📝 Description
What does this PR do? Link to related issues with `Fixes #123` or `Related to #456`.

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix / audit response

## 📦 Which Package(s)?
- [ ] `@molt/captcha`
- [ ] `@molt/permit`
- [ ] `@molt/mesh`
- [ ] `@molt/eval`
- [ ] `@molt/memory`
- [ ] Root/monorepo

## ✅ Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No new warnings in build

## 📚 Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] JSDoc comments added (if public API)
- [ ] Migration guide included (if breaking)

## 🔒 Security
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] No dependency vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] No unsafe patterns added

## 🚀 Deployment Notes (if applicable)
Any special considerations for deployment or integration?
